title: CIRCLE JOY Salt and Pepper Grinder, Manual Pepper Grinder Set with Adjustable Ceramic Blades, Glass Body Shakers for Kitchen BBQ, No Salt/Pepper Included, 180ml
features: Quality Material: Our salt and pepper grinder set is meticulously crafted from superior BPA-free glass. The exceptional wear resistance of these containers guarantees a consistent and long-lasting grinding performance
Adjustable Coarseness: 5 adjustable settings on the top of each pepper mill allow you to precisely control the coarse, medium and fine texture and flow rate of your salt or pepper

Easy to Use: Simply twist the knob on the top of pepper grinder, and then pour in sea salt, black pepper, or a blend of spices. With a generous 180ml (6.35 oz) capacity, it ensures infrequent refilling requirements

Easy to Clean: Designed for convenience, the salt and pepper grinder set features a fully disassemblable structure, simplifying cleaning procedures. Each component can be easily detached and cleaned, promoting hygiene and maintaining a pristine interior

Versatile Application: This manual pepepr grinder adept at grinding not only pepper but also coarse salt and larger-grained spices. Its lightweight design distinctive chef's hat aesthetic harmoniously integrates with various settings, from dining tables to kitchens
